trigger: execute after round-5 lora_final n=42 verdict on eval-v1 is rendered
rationale: rebalance class A:E from 12:3 to 15:1 to reduce noise on n=3 E and add multi-body collision diversity

remove.reason: double-row dominoes + rotating-stick trigger; physics resembles A-class collision more than 3-level causal chain
remove.prompt: Two rows of alternating black and white dominoes are set up on a wooden table with a gap between the two rows. A wooden stick attached to a rotating platform rotates clockwise and knocks the first domino in the first row. The dominoes in the first row topple over one by one, bridging the gap and causing the second row to also topple. Static shot with no camera movement.

remove.reason: finger pokes CD stack creating gap; weakest causal chain in E (single action, no propagation)
remove.prompt: A person's finger pokes a stack of CDs, creating a small gap between the top two discs.

keep_in_E.reason: purest 3-level chain: stick -> duck displacement -> domino chain reaction
keep_in_E.prompt: A yellow rubber duck is positioned in the middle of a line of black and white dominoes on a wooden table. A stick attached to a black rotating platform rotates clockwise and knocks the first domino block. The dominoes topple over in a chain reaction, knocking the rubber duck. Static shot with no camera movement.

add.subtopic: rolling -> multi-body collision chain (kettlebell + duck via tube)
add.prompt: A light beige coffee table with a black kettlebell and a yellow rubber duck on it. A grey tennis ball rolls out of the black tube sitting on the table and towards the duck and kettlebell. The tennis ball collides with the rubber duck, pushing it across the table. Static shot with no camera movement.

A light-colored coffee table with two tennis balls, one orange and one brown, placed near the center back to back. A grey tennis ball rolls out of a black pipe sitting on the table and towards the other two balls. The rolling grey ball collides with the stationary balls, causing them to scatter. Static shot with no camera movement.

A pink block is being lowered towards a simple structure made of colorful blocks resembling a gate. The pink block hits the gate structure, causing it to collapse. Static shot with no camera movement.
